content: The driver of an oncoming car flashed his lights at Tom as a warning that there was a mobile speed camera up ahead. Tom, who had been speeding, immediately slowed down and passed the camera at just under the speed limit.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by patgfisher (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: TRANSLATION
